nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: My mental model of claude code is that it is an eager but very junior developer, and our conversations are like pair programming, with me calling the shots, reviewing and approving each step

nodes.label: AI as code generation assistant
nodes.grounding_span: I do not use claude to write emails, commit messages, documentation, anything like that. Code only

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: sometimes it makes mistakes a human would not

nodes.label: AI as tool for career advancement
nodes.label_negative: AI causing industry shrinkage and unemployment
nodes.grounding_span: my efforts using ai are sort of a 'if you can't beat em, join em'

nodes.label: AI as professional development tool
nodes.grounding_span: I also use claude when doing 'professional development', ie learning new skills or libraries or features

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency in code development
nodes.grounding_span: it is so effective that i super don't care

nodes.label: Social belonging and professional identity
nodes.grounding_span: I have strong language and communication skills, so I do not use claude to write emails

nodes.label: Career resilience and adaptability
nodes.grounding_span: to keep my job/career i need to switch my focus from learning language specific stuff to knowing these tools

nodes.label: Continuous learning and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: Working outside of my exact expertise, I actually learn and improve that area when using AI

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: when claude surprised me with a solution, i was very satisfied

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for bug understanding
nodes.grounding_span: god dammit, i vibe coded this thing and it's broken and i'm not sure how to fix it

nodes.label: Bleak outlook on industry and employment
nodes.grounding_span: I think its eventually leading to a shrinking of my industry and unemployment for me

nodes.label: Cautious optimism about AI-enabled app boom
nodes.grounding_span: I hope for a 'boom' in AI enabled applications

nodes.label: Iterative review-and-refine loop
nodes.grounding_span: I make claude ask before each code change, and often iterate a couple times (option 3) before allowing the edit to be made

nodes.label: Strategic concealment of AI usage
nodes.grounding_span: I also underreport how much I use it. I work remote and would prefer people not know how much I use AI
